bundles.name: Abyssal Aquarium
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Bioluminescent drift through a deep-sea gallery, where specimens peek from inky depths and a luminous jellyfish bloom occasionally crosses the mid-water dark.

bundles.name: Aurora
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Electric ribbons of teal, chartreuse, and magenta drape over a frozen lake, with the occasional shooting star slipping above the aurora line.

bundles.name: Balcony Noon
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Sun-soaked anime balcony at high noon: laundry catches a gust, a tabby silhouette eases past the window, and the city hum keeps its distance.

bundles.name: Beach Umbrellas
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Top-down travel-poster beach at bright midday with striped umbrella clusters, tide foam, and the occasional rogue beach ball rolling across the empty sand.

bundles.name: Big Sky
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Prairie horizon under towering cumulus with a subtle iris-shaped cloud, a distant rain curtain, and a V-formation of birds drifting along the skyline.

bundles.name: Circuit Garden
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A living motherboard overgrown with neon orchids and capacitor mushrooms, with a ladybug specimen that walks one glowing copper trace and disappears under a leaf.

bundles.name: Cloud City
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Warm brass gondola deck of a Ghibli-lineage cloud city at pastel sunrise, where a single paper airplane glides between the peach and mint cumulus layers.

bundles.name: Flux
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Marbled ink currents in navy, crimson, and amber with a silent central hollow. A slow-cadence ink-drop splash ripples outward whenever the painting breathes.

bundles.name: Iris Observatory
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Mountaintop brass telescope pointed at a plum-and-cobalt night, with one pulsing iris-eye star and a lens that focuses itself every forty-odd seconds.

bundles.name: Mercado
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Mexican mercado aisle in marigold, cobalt, and cream, where a sudden sway of papel picado drops a brief burst of confetti through the sunbeam bands.

bundles.name: Oddling Desktop
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: The ODD default: a plum CRT terrarium alive with drifting specimens, curious edge-eyes, and tiny file-tab fossils that slow-orbit the desktop.

bundles.name: Origami
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Soft sakura-and-mint paper-craft tabletop, with one paper shape that quietly opens and refolds itself for any patient watcher.

bundles.name: Pocket Dimension
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A Victorian drawing room shattered into floating islands orbiting a luminous oval portal that iris-blinks at the viewer between long stretches of nebula calm.

bundles.name: Rainfall
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Painterly noir rain scene that splashes on every real desktop surface, with a rare silent heat-lightning flash punctuating the upper sky.

bundles.name: Sun Print
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Cyanotype prints drying on a cotton line above a sunlit lawn; the subject shadow beneath redraws itself as if the sun had just crept across.

bundles.name: Terrazzo
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Polished terrazzo floor in cream with coral, teal, mustard, and slime-green confetti chips, where one rogue chip slowly rotates in place on a clean stone island.

bundles.name: Tide Pool
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Overhead macro tide pool in turquoise and lavender with one pearlescent eye-gleam hidden in a shell, and a hermit crab that occasionally scuttles across the clear sand.

bundles.name: Tropical Greenhouse
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Victorian palm-house light pouring through monstera, banana, and tree fern, with a soft mist puff that rolls through the center every so often.

bundles.name: Weather Factory
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Steampunk cloud-machine conveyor of raindrops, snowflakes, and autumn leaves over a pastel sky; every long cycle it runs the wrong weather on purpose.

bundles.name: Wildflower Meadow
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Monet-meets-Pixar hillside of coreopsis, poppies, and cornflower, where a painted butterfly lingers on a bloom before drifting off toward the sun.

bundles.name: Arcade Tokens
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Embossed bronze-and-gold coin icons with pressed-in glyphs, hairline relief cracks, scuff glints, and one subtly bent coin in the set. Jingles in your pocket.

bundles.name: Arctic
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Frosted-glass app tiles with icy gradients and a creeping frost crystal in one corner of every tile. High contrast for busy wallpapers.

bundles.name: Blueprint
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Cobalt blueprint tiles with cyan construction lines, brass margin rulers, a coffee-ring stain, and a handwritten key caption on every icon.

bundles.name: Botanical Plate
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Copperplate ink and green watercolor wash on aged paper, each plate pinned, foxed, and labeled like a specimen from a naturalist's field guide.

bundles.name: Brutalist Stencil
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Chunky stencil badges with concrete shadows, hazard yellow, and wheat-paste torn corners; a few icons sport a fresh spray-paint drip.

bundles.name: Circuit Bend
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: PCB-green tiles with gold traces, solder blobs, one bent rerouted trace, and a red LED that rotates position per icon. Pairs with Circuit Garden.

bundles.name: Claymation
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Puffy stop-motion clay sculpts with hand fingerprints pressed into each piece and a stray crumb or two on the baseplate.

bundles.name: Cross-Stitch
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Rose cross-stitch pixel art on linen, with one deliberately skipped stitch per icon, a linen fray tuft, and a threaded needle resting on the tools tile.

bundles.name: Eyeball Avenue
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Glossy surreal eyeball tiles with neon lids, role props, a fresh tear highlight, and a bloodshot vein fork on a few of the more stressed icons.

bundles.name: Filament
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Glowing neon filament tubes over dark glass with warm reflector glare and a visible filament kink baked into every glyph.

bundles.name: Fold
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Origami-inspired tiles with folded paper facets, inked role glyphs, visible paper grain, and torn-edge variations on a handful of keys.

bundles.name: Hologram
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Iridescent foil-sticker glyphs with rainbow shift, a scratched surface pass, and a peel corner that varies from icon to icon.

bundles.name: Lemonade Stand
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Crayon glyphs on sunny yellow gingham, each with a dripping crayon streak and a lemon wedge tucked into one corner.

bundles.name: Monoline
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Glossy full-color UI stickers with thick glyphs, candy gradients, a tape residue streak, and a slightly lifted sticker edge on a few icons.

bundles.name: Oddlings
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Dashicons-readable admin icons on a specimen-plum glass base, each wearing one creature trait: eyes, teeth, antennae, slit pupils, or a curious tongue. Recognizable first, weird second.

bundles.name: Risograph
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Two-color riso print look in fluorescent pink and cyan with a baked-in off-register second pass and an ink smudge along the bottom edge.

bundles.name: Stadium
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Chenille varsity-patch icons on crimson backing with dashed stitching, a loose thread dangling from one seam, and a frayed pennant corner.

bundles.name: Tiki
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Mid-century tiki-lounge tiles with wood grain, rattan frame, a burn mark on every piece, and one undone rattan strand catching the light.

bundles.name: Magic 8-Ball
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A WordPress-flavored magic 8-ball. Click to shake for wisdom.

bundles.name: Sticky Note
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A tilted handwritten sticky note that auto-saves as you type.

bundles.name: Board
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Cards. Columns. Drag. Drop. Done. A no-nonsense project board that shows you exactly what's happening, what's stuck, and what you can finally move to "done."

bundles.name: Flow
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Stop doomscrolling, start doing. A Pomodoro timer with ambient soundscapes, per-session task lists, and a heatmap so you can see exactly which days you crushed it.

bundles.name: Ledger
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Get paid. Track clients, generate polished invoices, and log payments without ever leaving WordPress.

bundles.name: Mosaic
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Tiny art, big feelings. A pixel editor with drawing tools, fills, undo/redo, and PNG export when you're ready to share your 32x32 masterpiece.

bundles.name: Sine
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A full synthesizer living inside your WordPress admin. Four waveforms, ADSR envelope, a resonant filter, and a step sequencer — all on pure Web Audio.

bundles.name: Swatch
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Pick colors like you mean it. Full HSL editing, harmony rules, WCAG contrast checks, and one-click export to CSS, Tailwind, or SVG.

bundles.name: Tome
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A fast internal wiki for your team. Write in markdown, organise into pages, find anything instantly.
